response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and a commendable entrepreneurial background, his profile falls short of the Director-level expectations for an AI Strategy role. His AI experience appears limited to very recent tooling work rather than the deep, recognized AI/ML strategic leadership and advisory capabilities required to shape enterprise cloud and AI platforms at a principal level.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Strong entrepreneurial background as a founder and active open-source contributor.
Demonstrated ability to share knowledge and inspire externally through public talks, workshops, and mentoring.
concerns: Lacks recognized, long-term expertise in AI/ML and strategic AI-powered product development.
Recent roles at the Senior and Staff levels do not demonstrate the Director-level strategic advisory experience required.
Does not hold the preferred Master's or PhD degree in an AI-related field.
